description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Stale-Reminder that runs on a schedule every Monday at 13:00 UTC and can be triggered manually. The workflow uses an ubuntu-latest job to identify issues that have not had recent interactions, categorize them based on their labels and last interaction dates, and then send a weekly email report to a predefined recipient with lists of recently interacted issues, potentially stale issues, and old issues that are exempt from staleness due to their labels.
